"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); Object.defineProperty(exports, "default", { enumerable: true, get: function() { return _default; } }); function _default(pluginConfig, plugins) { if (pluginConfig === undefined) { return plugins; } const pluginNames = Array.isArray(pluginConfig) ? pluginConfig : [ ...new Set(plugins.filter((pluginName)=>{ return pluginConfig !== false && pluginConfig[pluginName] !== false; }).concat(Object.keys(pluginConfig).filter((pluginName)=>{ return pluginConfig[pluginName] !== false; }))) ]; return pluginNames; }
